---
title: "ENV S 193DS Final"
author: "Sumaiya Alvi"
date: "March 17, 2026"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true # use this to display a table of contents
execute:
  message: false # use this to make sure messages don't show up
  warning: false # use this to make sure warnings don't show up
---

[link to Github repository](https://github.com/sumaiyaalvi/ENVS-193DS_final.git)

```{r}
#| label: load packages and data
#| message: false

library(tidyverse) #general use
library(here) #file organization
library(janitor) #cleaning data frames
library(readxl) #reading excel files

kelp <- read_csv(
  here( 
    "data", #data folder
    "Annual_Kelp_All_Years_20250903.csv" #kelp data 
  ))

screentime <- read_csv(
  here( 
    "data", #data folder
    "screentime.csv" #personal data 
  ))

mopl <- read_csv(
  here( 
    "data", #data folder
    "MOPL_nest-site_selection_Duchardt_et_al._2019.csv" #mountain plover data 
  )) 
```
